The Keeper of the Space

Katyayani — Founder of Gaia Core Sacred Space

My journey into healing began after a life-changing accident in 2000 that became the catalyst for a profound spiritual awakening. What started as a search for healing evolved into a lifelong path of studying consciousness, energy medicine, psychology, spirituality, and personal transformation.


Today I work as an Ethnopsychology Practitioner, Hypnotherapist, Reiki Master Teacher, Breathwork Facilitator, Trauma Practitioner, Kundalini and Energy Activation Facilitator, and Higher Consciousness Coach — integrating practical psychology with spiritual wisdom to help people heal emotional wounds, reconnect with themselves, and embody greater levels of awareness and authenticity.


"Healing is not about becoming someone else. It is about remembering who you truly are beneath the conditioning, wounds, and limitations that life has placed upon you."


Awaken. Heal. Embody. Become.

Spiritual Education

Understanding Healing

A growing library of teachings to support your journey of awakening, healing, and embodiment. Articles, videos, and wisdom shared from the heart of Gaia Core Sacred Space.

Consciousness · Higher Chakras

DNA Activation and the Higher Chakras: Awakening Your Full Potential

As humanity evolves, many people are experiencing a growing desire for deeper meaning, greater awareness, and a stronger connection to their soul purpose. This often leads them to explore concepts such as DNA Activation, higher consciousness, and the Higher Chakras. But what do these terms actually mean?

Read More →

Understanding DNA Activation

DNA Activation is not about physically changing your genetic structure. Rather, it is a spiritual and energetic process that supports the awakening of dormant aspects of consciousness that already exist within you.

Many spiritual traditions teach that human beings are far more than physical bodies. We are multidimensional beings with the capacity to access greater wisdom, intuition, creativity, compassion, and spiritual awareness. DNA Activation works with energy, intention, consciousness, and spiritual alignment to help individuals reconnect with these higher potentials.

People often report experiencing:

  • ✦  Increased intuition
  • ✦  Greater self-awareness
  • ✦  Enhanced spiritual connection
  • ✦  Emotional healing and release
  • ✦  Greater clarity regarding life purpose
  • ✦  A deeper sense of inner peace and alignment
  • ✦  Stronger connection to their authentic self

Beyond the Seven Chakras

Most people are familiar with the traditional seven chakra system, which relates to our physical, emotional, and psychological development. However, many spiritual teachings describe additional chakras that exist beyond the physical body. These Higher Chakras act as bridges between our human experience and our higher spiritual nature.

The 8th Chakra – The Soul Star

Located above the crown chakra, the Soul Star Chakra is often associated with the soul's wisdom, higher purpose, and spiritual guidance. When activated, individuals may feel a stronger connection to their soul path, increased intuition, greater trust in their spiritual journey, and expanded awareness beyond everyday concerns.

The 9th Chakra – Divine Wisdom

The Ninth Chakra is often associated with expanded consciousness and access to higher spiritual understanding — greater clarity, deepened meditation experiences, and enhanced connection to universal wisdom.

The 10th Chakra – Soul Integration

The Tenth Chakra supports the integration of spiritual awareness into daily life. Rather than escaping the physical world, this chakra helps us embody our spiritual understanding in practical ways — through our relationships, choices, and actions.

The 11th Chakra – Divine Co-Creation

The Eleventh Chakra is associated with conscious creation and alignment with higher spiritual principles — greater alignment with purpose, increased manifestation abilities, deeper trust in divine timing, and enhanced service to others.

The 12th Chakra – Unity Consciousness

The Twelfth Chakra represents a state of expanded awareness and connection with the greater whole — encouraging compassion, unity, wisdom, and a deeper understanding of our interconnectedness with all life.

Why Work with DNA Activation and the Higher Chakras?

Many people feel that they have already done significant healing work but still sense that something greater is calling them forward. DNA Activation and Higher Chakra work can support those who wish to move beyond healing alone and into embodiment, spiritual growth, expanded awareness, and conscious living.

The purpose is not to become someone different. The purpose is to remember the wisdom, gifts, and potential that already exist within you.

At Gaia Core Sacred Space, DNA Activation sessions work with energy awareness, higher chakra activation, guided processes, and spiritual integration practices designed to support your personal journey of awakening and embodiment.

The journey of ascension is not about leaving the world behind. It is about fully embodying your highest potential within it.

Energy Healing · Holistic Wellness

What Is Energy Healing?

Energy Healing is a holistic approach to well-being that works with the understanding that the body, mind, emotions, and spirit are interconnected. When this energy flows freely, we feel balanced, grounded, and connected...

Read More →

Energy Healing is a holistic approach to well-being that works with the understanding that the body, mind, emotions, and spirit are interconnected.

Across many cultures and healing traditions, it has long been believed that a subtle life-force energy flows through and around the body. When this energy flows freely, we often feel balanced, grounded, and connected. When stress, trauma, emotional challenges, or life experiences create imbalance, we may experience physical tension, emotional overwhelm, fatigue, anxiety, or a sense of disconnection.

Energy Healing supports the body's natural ability to restore balance by working with this energetic aspect of ourselves.

How Does Energy Healing Work?

During a session, the practitioner uses various techniques to help identify and support areas of energetic imbalance. Depending on the practitioner's training, this may include:

  • ✦  Gentle hands-on or hands-off energy work
  • ✦  Chakra balancing
  • ✦  Breathwork
  • ✦  Sound healing
  • ✦  Guided relaxation
  • ✦  Intuitive energy awareness
  • ✦  Grounding and embodiment practices

The intention is not to "fix" the individual, but to create a supportive environment where the body, mind, and energy system can move toward greater harmony.

What Can Energy Healing Support?

Many people seek Energy Healing to support:

  • ✦  Stress reduction
  • ✦  Relaxation and nervous system regulation
  • ✦  Emotional balance
  • ✦  Increased energy and vitality
  • ✦  Greater self-awareness
  • ✦  Improved sense of well-being
  • ✦  Personal growth and spiritual development
  • ✦  Feeling more grounded and centered

Energy Healing is not a replacement for medical treatment, diagnosis, or professional mental health care. Rather, it is often used alongside conventional healthcare as a complementary wellness practice.

What Does a Session Feel Like?

Every person's experience is unique. Some people report feeling deeply relaxed, peaceful, or lighter after a session. Others may experience emotional release, increased clarity, a sense of calm, or a deeper connection to themselves. Some simply enjoy the opportunity to slow down, rest, and reconnect with their body.

There is no right or wrong experience.

Energy Healing at Gaia Core Sacred Space

At Gaia Core Sacred Space, Energy Healing sessions integrate a range of supportive modalities including energy balancing, breathwork, chakra awareness, sound therapy, grounding practices, and consciousness-based approaches.

Each session is tailored to the individual's needs and is designed to provide a safe, compassionate space for healing, restoration, and self-discovery.

At its heart, Energy Healing is about creating balance, supporting well-being, and helping individuals reconnect with the wisdom and healing potential that already exists within them.

"The healer does not heal you. The healer creates the space in which your own healing can unfold."

← Read Less

Trauma · Nervous System · Body Healing

Understanding Trauma and the Body

When most people hear the word "trauma," they often think of a major life event. But trauma is not simply what happens to us — it is what happens within us as a result of experiences that overwhelm our ability to cope, process, or feel safe...

Read More →

When most people hear the word "trauma," they often think of a major life event such as an accident, abuse, violence, or a significant loss.

While these experiences can certainly be traumatic, trauma is not simply what happens to us.

Trauma is what happens within us as a result of experiences that overwhelm our ability to cope, process, or feel safe.

Trauma Lives in the Body

The body is designed to respond to stress and danger. When faced with a threat, our nervous system automatically shifts into survival mode. This may involve:

  • ✦  Fight — confronting the threat
  • ✦  Flight — escaping the threat
  • ✦  Freeze — becoming immobilized
  • ✦  Fawn — people-pleasing to stay safe

These responses are natural and necessary for survival. The challenge arises when the body remains stuck in these survival patterns long after the danger has passed. Even when the mind understands that an event is over, the body may continue to react as if it is still happening.

This is why many people say:

  • "I know I'm safe, but I don't feel safe."
  • "I can't relax."
  • "I feel constantly anxious."
  • "I keep repeating the same patterns."
  • "I'm always waiting for something to go wrong."

The body remembers what the mind may have forgotten.

Signs Trauma May Be Stored in the Body

Trauma can show up in many ways, including:

  • ✦  Chronic stress and anxiety
  • ✦  Hypervigilance & difficulty relaxing
  • ✦  Sleep disturbances
  • ✦  Emotional numbness or unexplained tension
  • ✦  Digestive issues & fatigue
  • ✦  Panic responses
  • ✦  Feeling disconnected from yourself

These responses are not signs of weakness. They are often signs of a nervous system that has spent a long time trying to protect you.

Why Talking Alone Is Sometimes Not Enough

Traditional approaches often focus on understanding trauma through conversation and insight. While understanding is important, trauma is not stored only in our thoughts. It is also stored within the nervous system, the muscles, the breath, and the body's protective patterns.

This is why many people understand their challenges intellectually but continue to experience the same emotional and physical responses. The body needs an opportunity to feel safe enough to release what it has been carrying.

The Role of the Nervous System

The nervous system is constantly scanning the environment for safety or danger. When we experience prolonged stress, unresolved trauma, or repeated emotional overwhelm, the nervous system can become dysregulated.

Hyperarousal

The body remains in a heightened state of alertness — feeling like anxiety, overthinking, restlessness, irritability, or difficulty sleeping.

Hypoarousal

The body moves into shutdown as a protective response — feeling like exhaustion, emotional numbness, depression, disconnection, or lack of motivation.

Healing involves helping the nervous system return to a state of balance where we can respond to life rather than constantly react from survival.

Healing Through the Body

Healing trauma is not about forcing ourselves to "get over it." It is about helping the body learn that it is safe again. Practices that can support this process include:

  • ✦  Breathwork
  • ✦  Mindfulness and meditation
  • ✦  Grounding techniques
  • ✦  Gentle movement & somatic awareness
  • ✦  Energy healing
  • ✦  Trauma-informed therapy & nervous system regulation

Healing Is a Journey Back to Yourself

Trauma often disconnects us from our bodies, our emotions, and our sense of self. Healing is not about becoming a different person. It is about reconnecting with the parts of yourself that learned to hide, protect, or shut down in order to survive.

The body is not working against you. The body is trying to protect you. When we learn to listen to its wisdom with compassion rather than judgment, healing becomes possible.

At Gaia Core Sacred Space, we support this journey through trauma-informed approaches that may include breathwork, nervous system education, hypnotherapy, energy healing, meditation, and embodiment practices designed to help individuals reconnect with safety, balance, and their authentic selves.

Because healing begins when the body no longer has to carry the burden alone.

Earth Wisdom

From the Sacred Space

My Story · Transformation

The Accident That Changed Everything

In 2000, my life changed in a way I never expected. What appeared to be a devastating accident became the doorway to a journey of healing, self-discovery, and spiritual awakening...

Read More →

In 2000, my life changed in a way I never expected.

What appeared to be a devastating accident became the doorway to a journey of healing, self-discovery, and spiritual awakening. Like many people facing physical pain, emotional challenges, and uncertainty, I found myself searching for answers that conventional approaches alone could not provide.

What began as a search for healing gradually evolved into a deeper exploration of consciousness, energy, psychology, spirituality, and the extraordinary capacity of the human being to transform.

Over the years, I immersed myself in the study of healing modalities, energy work, breathwork, hypnotherapy, Reiki, spiritual psychology, trauma healing, and higher consciousness teachings. Each experience revealed another piece of the puzzle, not only for my own healing but for understanding how we as human beings grow, awaken, and embody our authentic selves.

This journey eventually led to the creation of Gaia Core Sacred Space — a place dedicated to healing, awakening, empowerment, and transformation.

Today, I have the privilege of supporting others through energy healing, hypnotherapy, breathwork, Reiki, women's circles, ascension teachings, consciousness activation work, and sacred community spaces. I am also the creator of the Sacred Trinity Oracle Deck, inspired by the transformative energies of Kali, Shiva, and Shakti.

If there is one thing I have learned, it is this: Healing is not about becoming someone new. It is about remembering who you truly are beneath the layers of conditioning, fear, trauma, and limitation.

Every challenge we face carries within it the potential for growth. Every wound contains the possibility of wisdom. Every ending creates space for a new beginning.

My hope is that through sharing my story, you may find inspiration for your own journey of healing, awakening, and embodiment.

Welcome to Gaia Core Sacred Space.

With love,
Katyayani
